---
title: "Person-Reported Hypoglycaemia Data"
---


```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


---
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{hypometrics: Physical Activity and Sleep Data}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

<style>
.nobullet li{
  list-style-type: none;
}
</style>

![](hypo_logo.png)

## Introduction

As part of the Hypo-METRICS study, the bespoke Hypo-METRICS app was developed via the software platform provided by [uMotif Limited](https://www.umotif.com). The `hypometrics` package reads in data from the original version of the Hypo-METRICS app. The Hypo-METRICS app features have since evolved and future work will ensure that this is reflected in the package. 

## Data Cleaning

## Data Checking

## Data Visualising

## Data Linking
